view.title: Validate explicit UC need #3

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of different providers per step.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of having different providers for each step in the saga. However, the evidence provided does not include any confirmation of the assignment of different providers to the individual steps of the service. The only available evidence pertains to the overall booking process without addressing the specific requirement of provider differentiation, indicating a lack of sufficient evidence to make a definitive judgment.
